query: The Bear season 5 rotten tomatoes metacritic critic reviews score
a_issues: Content A never explicitly states a Metacritic critic score (Metascore); it only shows a Metacritic user-score snippet (8.0/25 ratings) which doesn't match the anchor's actual metascore (81) or user score (7.9/16). b_issues: Content B contains internal inconsistency on the Rotten Tomatoes score (Yahoo and IMDb say 100%, Instagram says 97% in body text but 100% in title), so the exact RT percentage is unclear, but it does correctly surface the Metacritic score of 81 (matching the anchor) via the Yahoo article, and one source (Instagram) states 97%, aligning with the anchor.
reasoning: The anchor establishes the correct facts as RT 97% (73 reviews) and Metacritic 81 (26 critic reviews).
